name: G2 Goldfields Inc.
description: G2 Goldfields Inc. is a high-grade gold explorer focused on the Oko-Ghanie project in the Cuyuni Mining District of Guyana, hosting the Oko main zone, Ghanie gold zone, and north-west Oko gold deposits. The company agreed to a C$2.2 billion acquisition by G Mining Ventures Corp. that would consolidate adjacent gold projects in Guyana's Cuyuni Mining District.
